Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the second day of summer school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14802 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}I know it's hot, everyone, but let's just try and get through class. Focus pocus! Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Still, who would've thought people would actually attend this course over the summer? You sure are a curious lot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}I'm not really sure what to make of that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Well, anyway, let's talk about something interesting today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}All you future magicians will want to pay close attention... Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Today's subject is tarot. That's right, those cards often used in fortune telling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Despite originating in 15th-century Europe as normal playing cards, tarot cards evolved into tools of divination.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}There are a variety of tarot card decks, including the Marseille and the Rider decks...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}But today, in honor of the great Crowley, we will be using the Thoth deck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14806 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}First, let's talk about the composition of the deck...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The modern 78-card tarot deck is divided into two parts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}There are 22 Major Arcana—the face cards—and 56 Minor Arcana, or number cards...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The Minor Arcana are also sometimes called pip cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The Major Arcana feature a variety of illustrations on their faces.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Beginning with the Fool and ending with the Universe...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}They tell a story in numerical order that represents an individual's journey through life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Each Major Arcana represents a stage on that journey...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}And each stage represents an event an individual must experience to achieve wholeness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14807 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}They are all important, so let's take a look at each of the 22 cards, one by one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The first card, numbered 0, is the Fool. It represents beginnings and suggests infinite possibilities.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}In other words, the beginning of life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The next card, the Magician, represents action and initiative... but also immaturity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The High Priestess represents contemplation and inner knowledge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The Empress represents both motherhood and maternal love as well as one's vitality.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The Emperor is an opposing card. It represents fatherhood as well as leadership and decision-making skills.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The Hierophant represents formality and knowledge. It is a symbol for religion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14805 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The Lovers represent choice. Here, the individual finally begins to develop a conscience.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The Chariot represents the individual's victory, but only a momentary one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Justice is exactly what it sounds like: knowing what is right and what is wrong.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The Hermit represents self-reflection. In other words, searching for answers deep within one's heart.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Fortune represents fate, and the opportunities it brings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Strength represents both passion and self-control. It is depicted as power with reason.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The Hanged Man reflects the individual's inability to take action.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Spiritual death awaits the individual with the thirteenth card, which is aptly named Death.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Death is considered a transitional card...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}With death, the old ends, and the new begins.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14808 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Now, let us move on to what happens following the transition.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Temperance is the balancing of opposites. Opening one's eyes to the world allows for growth...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}And then an encounter with the Devil is where one faces temptation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}At the Tower, the individual's values will start to collapse. It seems as if there's nothing to believe in...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The individual then finds a glimmer of hope in the Star, granting one peace and serenity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}In turn, this makes one vulnerable to the Moon's illusions, which gives way to fear and trepidation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}But the individual may be rewarded with a bright future by the Sun, which signifies true achievement.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Judgement awaits the individual at the journey's end when looking back on the path one has traveled.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The final card is the Universe, which represents the individual reaching full awareness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}And that's the growth of an individual as explained by the tarot cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Perhaps all this talk about life doesn't hit home with you young folks just yet, hm? Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14804 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Well, now you can use all 78 cards to divine the future in detail...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}...But most people only use the 22 Major Arcana.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Okay. Next, let's talk about fortune telling using the Major Arcana.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}First, you will need to shuffle the cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}If a card is reversed, its meaning will change. Now, this is important, so pay attention...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Edogawa continues[n]to drone on and on...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Despite the summer heat, I manage[n]to pay attention to his lecture.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the fifth day of summer school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}How are you all handling the heat? I could brew you some of my special tea if you'd like... Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Now, let's continue with our special summer course, The Truth Behind Magic.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}I'll be talking about Kabbalah.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}I assume all of you have at least heard of Kabbalah, yes?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}It is known as the mystical study of the Hebrew scriptures, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}As I've mentioned before, it had a great impact on Western sorcery.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}It has been said that, to learn the secrets of magic, you must first understand Kabbalah.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14815 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}So, who was the person who formed this incredible ideology known as Kabbalah?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Well, according to legend, it was Moses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Yes, that Moses. The Moses who gave us the Ten Commandments and split the Red Sea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}But in reality, it was formulated by a group of rabbis long, long ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}However, because it features such a complicated coded system...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Kabbalah did not become known to the Western world until much later.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Now, it is important to note that there are many different ancient methods of deciphering Kabbalah.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}For example, there is Gematria, the interpretation of text by replacing letters with the numbers they represent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}There is Notarikon, where you take a letter from each word to form another sentence or thought.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}There is also Temurah, a method where letters of words are replaced, thereby giving the sentence a new meaning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}All these different methods make it difficult to fully comprehend Kabbalah.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14806 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Now, one of the most important ideas of Kabbalah is the Tree of Life, comprised of the ten Sefirot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Most illustrations depict it as a chart shaped like a tree.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}The ten nodes represented by the Sefirot and the 22 paths connecting them...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}All come together to form a map of God's creation and the spiritual ascent of man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Where did we come from? Where are we going? These answers lie in the Sefirot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}When training your magic, it's important to picture the Sefirot every so often.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}And when you are meditating, you should focus on the Sefirot as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}This is going to be on the test, you know. They say knowledge is another form of magic, so study hard![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}If you find yourself struggling, well, you may wish to turn to the Sefirot... Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}By the way, did you all notice that I said there were 22 paths?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14823 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Yes, that's right. The same number as the Major Arcana I spoke of before... Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Now, continuing on—according to Kabbalah, existence is broken up into four "worlds"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}I'll be giving {f 0 1 2}supplementary lessons at the nurse's office{f 0 1 27} as of the second semester.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}I'm thinking of doing demonstrations with tarot cards.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}But I won't have time for that during the lecture... So if you're interested, {f 0 1 2}stop by after school{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1081}Everyone is welcome... Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Edogawa continues[n]to drone on and on...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Despite the summer heat, I managed[n]to pay attention to his lecture.[n]{f 1 1}
